case_title: THOMAS IVELI VS. FRANKLYN CLARY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: DEFENDANT'S UPDATED ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT YOKOYAMA, STACY
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,488.45 FILED BY IVELI, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CLARY, FRANKLYN CLARY, FREDDY YOKOYAMA, STACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IVELI, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT YOKOYAMA, STACY
REMARK:CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM STACY ANNE YOKOYAMA RE: WRONG PERSON IDENTIFIED IN THIS MATTER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-06-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLARY, FRANKLYN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-06-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLARY, FREDDY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-08-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THOMAS IVELI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS FREDDY CLARY AND STACY YUKOYAMA ARE PRESENT. FREDDY CLARY INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT FRANKLYN CLARY WAS HIS SON AND IS DECEASED. PARTIES REPORT THAT AN AGREEMENT WAS REACHED. FREEDY CLARY WILL PAY THE PLAINTIFF $4500.00 BY CHECK. IF THE CHECK CLEARS PARTIES ARE NOT REQUIRED TO APPEAR AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IVELI, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CLARY, FRANKLYN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IVELI, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CLARY, FREDDY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS IVELI. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS FRANKLYN CLARY, FREDDY CLARY AND STACY YOKOYAMA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
